description: Add category support to CLI and config: Projects currently have name, path, and tags fields. Add 'category' field to Project struct in pkg/config/config.go. Config struct should have 'categories' []string field that defines both available categories and their display order. Update example-config.yaml to show category examples. Add CLI commands: 'wt config category list' (show categories in configured order), 'wt config category set <project-name> <category>' (assign category to project), 'wt config category add <category>' (add category to config.categories list). Category is optional - projects without category field should still work. See existing tag commands in cmd/config.go as reference pattern.
acceptance_criteria: Project struct has optional Category string field
Config struct has Categories []string field defining available categories and display order
CLI command 'wt config category list' shows categories in configured order
CLI command 'wt config category set <name> <cat>' assigns category to project
CLI command 'wt config category add <category>' appends category to config list
example-config.yaml includes categories list and per-project category examples
Existing projects without category field load without errors
